name: fall-protection-thin
notes: Bare-bones fall-protection program. Should produce strengths/gaps with fall protection mentioned and overallAssessment of needs_work or insufficient_context.

input.documentText: Fall Protection Program. All work above 6 feet requires personal fall arrest. Use harness, lanyard, and anchor point. Inspect equipment daily. Report defects to the foreman.
input.additionalGcContext: GC requires 100% tie-off above 4 feet, daily DAS sign-off, and a documented rescue plan.
